problem id: 63227af6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) XOR SHL(3)

examples:
  11011010 -> 10111101
  00101100 -> 01110110
  10110011 -> 01000001
  00010001 -> 00000000
  11110000 -> 11111000
  11001011 -> 10111101
  00101110 -> 01100111
  00011001 -> 01000100
  11101011 -> 10101101
  00010111 -> 00110011

query: 01011111
predicted answer: 01010111
